name: RMSD Calculator
description: Calculate RMSD between 2 protein structures. Rotate/translate one set of atoms on top of another to minimize RMSD, including for proteins of different lengths.
capabilities: Rotate/translate one set of atoms on top of another to minimize RMSD, including for proteins of different lengths

structure_1.description: First protein structure for RMSD calculation

structure_2.description: Second protein structure for RMSD calculation
